items.definition_en: An artichoke is a green vegetable with thick leaves and a tender heart.
items.example_en: I added an artichoke to the salad.

items.definition_en: Asparagus is a long, green vegetable with a tender tip.
items.example_en: We grilled some asparagus for dinner.

items.definition_en: A blueberry is a small, round, blue fruit.
items.example_en: Blueberries grow well in this garden.

items.definition_en: Cabbage is a leafy vegetable with a tight, round head.
items.example_en: She picked a fresh cabbage from the garden.

items.definition_en: A courgette is a green vegetable also known as zucchini.
items.example_en: He sliced the courgette for the stew.

items.definition_en: A currant is a small, juicy fruit that grows in clusters.
items.example_en: Red currants are ready to be picked.

items.definition_en: A fig is a soft, sweet fruit with many seeds inside.
items.example_en: The fig tree is full of ripe fruit this year.

items.definition_en: A gooseberry is a small, round, green or yellow fruit.
items.example_en: She made a pie with gooseberries from her garden.

items.definition_en: A herb is a plant used for its flavor or smell in cooking.
items.example_en: Fresh herbs can really improve a dish.

items.definition_en: Kale is a dark green leafy vegetable rich in nutrients.
items.example_en: Spinach and kale are both popular garden greens.

items.definition_en: A parsnip is a long, white root vegetable.
items.example_en: She roasted parsnips with carrots for lunch.

items.definition_en: A raspberry is a soft, red fruit made up of tiny segments.
items.example_en: Raspberries grow on thorny bushes.

items.definition_en: Rocket is a leafy green with a peppery taste.
items.example_en: I like to add rocket to my salads.

items.definition_en: Rhubarb is a plant with thick, red stalks that are sour.
items.example_en: She used fresh rhubarb to make a tart.

items.definition_en: Squash is a vegetable with a hard or soft outer skin.
items.example_en: They grew squash of many shapes and sizes.

items.definition_en: A turnip is a round, white or purple root vegetable.
items.example_en: He harvested turnips before the first frost.

items.definition_en: A sugar snap pea is a sweet and crunchy green pod.
items.example_en: Sugar snap peas are great for snacking in the garden.

items.definition_en: A blackberry is a dark purple fruit with a sweet flavor.
items.example_en: We picked blackberries in the morning.

items.definition_en: A garden pea is a small, round, green vegetable found in pods.
items.example_en: He shelled garden peas for tonight’s dinner.

items.definition_en: Watercress is a leafy green with a spicy taste.
items.example_en: She sprinkled fresh watercress on her sandwich.
